plugins.name: dafke-sdlc

plugins.name: dafke-frontend
plugins.description: Frontend standards — Pasport design system (light/dark), next-intl i18n (EN/NL/FR/DE), and UI/UX patterns with Framer Motion. Next.js only.

plugins.name: dafke-skills
plugins.description: Author and optimize Dafke skills (wraps Anthropic skill-creator) with token-efficiency conventions.
